flashcards.definition: Rearrange so sin θ = k, cos θ = k, or tan θ = k.
The first answer from the inverse trig function.
Determine which quadrants yield the correct sign to find all solutions.
Add full-period multiples (2nπ or nπ) to cover all solutions.
Equation with trig function raised to the first power, e.g., 2cosθ + 1 = 0.
